stemHtml: State B requires visa from passengers arriving from State A. Do you need to have a visa when arriving as a pilot to State B according to ICAO Annex 9?

options.a: No, you have a CMC (Crew Member Certificate) so you don’t need a visa.
options.b: No, crew members do not need a visa if they have a valid a passport.
options.c: Yes, because a CMC is not valid for visa exemption in this case.
options.d: Yes, as visa requirements apply to all individuals, including crew members.
